trivia_bullets.text: Bone Pit Brute is an M21 original — no prior printing, no subsequent reprints as of the Scryfall prints record. It is legal in Pauper (despite its 6-mana cost) and Pauper Commander. [Scryfall prints search; Scryfall legalities]

Bone Pit Brute is a 4/5 Cyclops for six mana ({4}{R}{R}) with Menace; when it enters, target creature gets +4/+0 until end of turn. The enter-the-battlefield pump on top of Menace makes it a combo-finisher in Pauper blink or ramp lists where the ETB can be recurred. EDHREC rank 27283 reflects low Commander demand at six mana in a format with larger threats. [Scryfall oracle text; Scryfall legalities]

Flavor text: "Welcome to the club." — anonymous [Scryfall]. The phrase is the entire gag: a cyclops brute welcoming a newly dumped corpse (or captured rival) into a pit full of bones, delivering a gang-initiation line with deadpan menace. The art and text work together as a visual punch-line.

Illustrated by Victor Adame Minguez, a Spanish artist with a large MTG portfolio whose work spans sets from Battle for Zendikar through modern releases. MTGNexus hosts a gallery entry for this specific piece. Adame Minguez is noted within the MTG art community for painterly, high-detail figurative work; the comedic register of Bone Pit Brute's art is an outlier in his catalog. [Scryfall artist field; MTGNexus gallery via WebSearch]
